name: Ember
effect: Inflicts burn on one target

name: Fireball
effect: Hurls a ball of fire at one target

name: Inferno
effect: Engulfs one target in intense flames

name: Flamestorm
effect: Erupts fire across all enemies

name: Frostbite
effect: Chills one target, applying frozen

name: Ice Shot
effect: Launches a shard of ice at one target

name: Blizzard
effect: Calls down a blizzard upon one target

name: Zero
effect: Absolute zero ice strike. Devastating single target damage.

name: Icestorm
effect: Blankets all enemies in freezing ice

name: Static Charge
effect: Jolts one target, may stun

name: Spark
effect: Fires a bolt of electricity at one target

name: Thunderbolt
effect: Strikes one target with a mighty bolt

name: Zyx
effect: Maximum voltage discharge. Devastating single target damage.

name: Thunderstorm
effect: Calls lightning down on all enemies

name: Mend
effect: Restores a small amount of HP to one ally

name: Heal
effect: Restores a moderate amount of HP to one ally

name: Cure
effect: Removes one status effect from an ally

name: Holy Bolt
effect: Holy bolt; bonus damage vs undead

name: Revive
effect: Revives a fallen ally at 1/4 max HP

name: Void Bolt
effect: Fires a bolt of void energy at one target

name: Drain
effect: Deals damage and absorbs HP from target

name: Hex
effect: Curses one target with a random debuff

name: Mind Break
effect: Deals damage and silences one target

name: Arcane Storm
effect: Unleashes arcane energy across all enemies
